original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of two dark, irregularly shaped fragments or shards. The upper fragment is larger with a rough, striated texture resembling wood grain or fibrous material. The lower fragment is flatter and smoother with visible scratch marks. A small, dark, oval-shaped object is positioned to the left of the lower fragment. Both fragments are set against a light, plain background.
Two fragments, upper fragment approximately triangular with vertical striations, lower fragment rectangular with smooth surface. Small oval object to the left.

elements.description: Black and white photograph of two dark, irregularly shaped, textured fragments. A small dark oval object is visible to the left of the lower fragment. The word 'CONFIDENTIAL' is stamped at the top and bottom, with handwritten text 'Excl #5' at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific text ('CONFIDENTIAL' stamp, 'Excl #5') that Description A does not mention at all, creating a direct contradiction about the presence of readable text within the visual content.
